project_type: Python multi-agent investment analysis system with CLI, MCP Server, Web Dashboard, and multi-platform bots
test_framework: pytest with tests/ directory, 55 tests covering imports, registry, API, CLI
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -e '.[dev]' 2. pytest tests/ -v (all 55 tests pass) 3. augur --version (shows 0.1.0) 4. python -c 'from augur import AgentRegistry; print(len(AgentRegistry().get_all()))' should show 17+
setup_instructions: pip install -e '.[dev]' in the project root
environment_constraints: No Docker daemon available. No external network (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY). Use AST/import validation only. yfinance not available for live data tests.
contribution_requirements: Commit directly to main. Each commit includes README updates. Chinese README at README.md, English at README_EN.md.
key_patterns: All source in src/augur/. Backward-compat shim in scanner/. Dashboard in dashboard/. SVG diagrams in docs/images/. Personas in personas/ (markdown docs) and src/augur/personas/ (Python agents). CLI uses Click. API uses FastAPI.
directory_structure: src/augur/ - main package, scanner/ - backward compat shim, dashboard/ - FastAPI web UI, docs/images/ - SVG diagrams, personas/ - investor persona docs, skills/ - individual skill packaging, tests/ - pytest tests, config/ - agents.yaml
